query:
SELECT d.mac, d.ownerId, COUNT(bi.id) as carousel_count
FROM devices d
LEFT JOIN background_images bi ON bi.userId = d.ownerId
WHERE d.mac IN ('98:c9:7c:d2:c5:aa', '70:2e:8e:96:0a:3c')
GROUP BY d.mac, d.ownerId;
command:
